_meta.purpose: Shared per-organ stop-rules every clinical persona (Bert / Vince / Mark / Mary / Riad / Heddy) reads. v1.4 retro (AP-7) found these thresholds scattered across personas with soft language; v1.5 makes them a single source of truth.
_meta.applicable_runner: wave1_runner + wave3_runner read this when assembling each expert context; experts may cite the JSON path directly in their reports.
_meta.review_cadence: review at each v1.x release; persona prompts must inline the thresholds — do not rely on memory.

exception_paths: dose-reduced raltitrexed 50% per EMA SmPC if eGFR 30-40
TAS-102 35→30 mg/m² start per PMID 34097100 if eGFR 30-60
low-dose cardio-protective regimen + serial troponin / NT-proBNP / ECHO q4w may be considered after cardio-onc clearance

stop_rules.trigger: Albumin < 28 g/L OR Child-Pugh class B/C OR ALT/AST > 3× ULN
exception_paths: nutritional rescue (PN / albumin replacement) to push ALB > 32 before re-evaluation
Y90 + DEBIRI: defer until liver-reserve recovers

stop_rules.trigger: Any active immune-related AE Grade ≥ 2 (CTCAE) OR ongoing steroid taper for AE
exception_paths: single-organ rechallenge with intensified monitoring per Allouchery rechallenge meta (PMID 33428586) — case-by-case
myocarditis G2+ → STRONG RELATIVE block per Mahmood 2018 (PMID 29567210) + Salem 2022 (PMID 30442497)

stop_rules.trigger: ANC < 1.0 × 10⁹/L OR PLT < 50 × 10⁹/L OR Hb < 80 g/L without transfusion plan
exception_paths: G-CSF support per ESMO supportive care guideline
Hb < 80 may be transfused before continuing fluoropyrimidine class

stop_rules.trigger: Grade ≥ 2 peripheral neuropathy from oxaliplatin OR baseline neuropathy precluding new neurotoxic agent
exception_paths: weekly oxaliplatin 65 mg/m² with calcium/magnesium prophylaxis (limited evidence)

stop_rules.trigger: Active bleeding OR recent (≤30d) major surgical procedure OR DAPT in CKD 3b+
exception_paths: bridge antiplatelet to single-agent ASA 30d before high-bleed-risk regimen — patient/cardio decides

stop_rules.trigger: QTcF > 480 ms baseline OR QTc-prolonging co-medication stack > 3 agents
exception_paths: magnesium / potassium repletion + co-med reduction may reopen the gate
